prompt: Use the Playwright browser to go to google.com and search for "Scala developer salary Argentina 2026 USD". Read the results. Output a ```table block with: {"headers":["Seniority","Salary Range (USD)","Source"],"rows":[["Junior","$XX-$XX","source"],["Mid","..."],["Senior","..."],["Lead","..."]]}
text:
Based on my research from multiple sources including Glassdoor, Howdy, Talently, Salancy surveys, and ScalaJobs.com, here's the salary data for Scala developers in Argentina for 2026:

```table
{
  "headers": ["Seniority", "Salary Range (USD)", "Source"],
  "rows": [
    ["Junior", "$16,000-$28,000", "Howdy, Talently, Salancy"],
    ["Mid", "$40,000-$65,000", "Interpolated from survey data"],
    ["Senior", "$60,000-$100,000", "Glassdoor Buenos Aires, Talently"],
    ["Lead", "$85,000-$170,000", "Glassdoor Buenos Aires specialists"]
  ]
}
```
